race.comment: CARRIEDO (12) looks to have found the ideal race for this stage of the campaign. Beaten just under a length first up then went even closer last time out. Should be at peak fitness now, the extra trip is no issue and gets in well after the claim. BOOMEROO (10) resumes after two adequate runs in the debut campaign and draws perfectly for the return, which follows some handy jumpouts. THE DEFENDER (2) is a long-time maiden but has run well in races with more depth than this, so he needs to be in calculations, especially from the plum draw. IRELAND'S TEARS (5) is on debut and has been prepping up nicely for a cagey stable, so the market needs to be monitored closely especially from the good draw. ROMUALD (1) is yet to place in seven starts, but the best run of the career came first up and there could be further improvement to come here.
